site.title: Rack Cards & Postcards | ION Print & Promo
site.description: Rack cards, postcards, and custom card printing in Simcoe County, GTA & Muskoka. Ideal for handouts, mailers, and promotions!

hero.title: Rack Cards & Postcards
hero.imageAlt: Professional rack card and postcard printing

centreText.title: Designed to deliver your message efficiently
centreText.description: Printed on sturdy card stock, postcards and rack cards are designed to deliver your message efficiently and clearly!

features.title: Rack Cards for High-Impact Information
features.description:
Rack cards are two-sided, easy-to-read pieces that work well in stands, on counters, in reception areas, or anywhere customers may be browsing for information. They are ideal for presenting key details in a clean, organized format and can be printed with gloss or matte finishes depending on the look and feel you want.

Rack cards are a great choice for businesses, organizations, and events that need to share information quickly and professionally, including:

  • Tourism and local attractions
  • Service overviews
  • Menus or price lists
  • Community programs or trade shows
  • In-store or front-desk displays

features.title: Postcards for Mail, Handouts & Promotions
features.description:
Postcards are one of the most efficient ways to promote, inform, or follow up with customers. Whether mailed directly, handed out at an event, included with a purchase, or used as a leave-behind, postcards deliver your message in a simple and memorable format.

They are commonly used for a wide range of marketing and communication needs, including:

  • Direct mail campaigns
  • Promotions and special offers
  • Event announcements
  • Thank-you or follow-up cards

Simple, cost-effective, and easy to distribute, postcards continue to be a reliable marketing tool for businesses and organizations of all sizes.

features.title: Additional Card Stock Prints
features.description:
For durable printed pieces that need to look polished and hold up over time, card stock is a practical choice. These materials are designed to be professional, easy to handle, and aligned with your brand.

We can design and print a variety of custom card stock items for everyday business, customer engagement, and event use, including:

  • Appointment cards
  • Loyalty or punch cards
  • Save-the-date cards
  • Announcement cards
  • Event printing and more
